name: Sunflower Chicken Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken breast, cut into bite size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure the rice is cooked and cooled, and the onions, celery, and carrots are chopped.
2. Combine the sesame oil and garlic powder in a bowl.
3. Heat an electric skillet or wok to about 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Add the chicken to the heated skillet and marinate briefly.
5. Stir-fry the chicken for about 5-7 minutes until halfway cooked.
6. Add onions, celery, and carrots to the skillet, along with 2 tablespoons of soy sauce.
7. Continue stir-frying to mix everything together.
8. Add the egg mixture (egg beaten with 1 teaspoon water) to the skillet.
9. Stir quickly until the egg is cooked.
10. Mix in the cold rice and remaining 2 tablespoons of soy sauce.
11. Cook over high heat until the rice is hot.
12. Serve with crisp toasted pita bread and fresh fruit, if desired.
